query:
SELECT 
  hunterStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct,
  AVG(hunterConfidence) as avg_confidence
FROM hunterVerificationLog
WHERE hunterStatus IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY hunterStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
